discontinued 09/30/2023
134 D0200I1_NGTV_STATE_CD D0200I1_NGTV_STATE_CD D0200I1 Resident Mood Interview - Negative Statement Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is experiencing negative thoughts (that they would be better off dead; thoughts of hurting themselves in some way). -=Not assessed/no information
0=No (enter 0 in column 2)
1=Yes (enter 0-3 in column 2)
9=No response (leave column 2 blank)
^=Blank (skip pattern) discontinued 09/30/2023
135
